def positive_python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_full_sort_for_top_n():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_full_sort_for_top_n"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag sorted(...)[0:n] or DataFrame sort_values().head() where nlargest/nsmallest or heap selection would bound work."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
